title: Crops Need Sky
description: This mod makes crops and plants require direct sky access to grow.
body: Crops Need Sky ==============   A Minecraft mod that makes crops and plants require direct sky access to grow, else they decay in a dead bush, adding a new layer of realism and challenge to farming.   ![demo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/677/demo_mini.gif)   Join Us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/6SM9WvgcY6) [![Join our Discord](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/6SM9WvgcY6?theme=discord-inverted&logoColor=7CF9A4)](https://discord.gg/6SM9WvgcY6) Features --------   * Plants require direct sky access to grow and survive * Plants without direct sky access will die when attempting to grow, turning into dead bushes * Affects the following blocks: * All standard crops (Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, etc.). Should be compatible with other modded crops as long as they extend CropBlock class * Melon and Pumpkin stems * Sugar Cane * Bamboo * Cactus * Sweet Berry Bushes * Prevents bone meal usage on plants without direct sky access   #### - This mod has no effect on tree saplings and fully grown plants #### - Glass(Fabric version only) or leaves blocks will still prevent plant growth     Custom config -------------   * Check the cropsneedsky.toml file inside your config folder to enable/disable mod features
